mango-health-benefits.name: Sarah K.
mango-health-benefits.comment: I had no idea mango had so much Vitamin C. I started adding it to breakfast and my energy feels better.

mango-health-benefits.name: Muhammad Ali
mango-health-benefits.comment: The blood sugar section was very helpful. Portion control plus yogurt worked well for me.

mango-health-benefits.name: Nadia R.
mango-health-benefits.comment: Excellent breakdown and practical tips. The nutrient table made it easy to understand.

apple-health-benefits.name: Arham
apple-health-benefits.comment: Started eating one apple daily and my afternoon cravings are noticeably lower.

apple-health-benefits.name: Hina M.
apple-health-benefits.comment: Great explanation about whole apples vs juice. This cleared up a lot for me.

apple-health-benefits.name: Bilal Q.
apple-health-benefits.comment: Loved the practical section on pairing with protein. Very useful article.

garlic-immunity-benefits.name: Farah S.
garlic-immunity-benefits.comment: The crush-and-wait tip was new for me. I am now using garlic more effectively.

garlic-immunity-benefits.name: Usman
garlic-immunity-benefits.comment: Balanced and realistic article. I appreciate the medication caution section.

garlic-immunity-benefits.name: Kiran A.
garlic-immunity-benefits.comment: Very clear writing and evidence references. Helped me answer family questions.

turmeric-health-benefits.name: Mehak
turmeric-health-benefits.comment: The section on realistic expectations is excellent. Finally, no hype and clear guidance.

turmeric-health-benefits.name: Adeel
turmeric-health-benefits.comment: I started adding turmeric with black pepper in soups. Easy and practical.

turmeric-health-benefits.name: Rimsha
turmeric-health-benefits.comment: Thanks for including precautions. That part is usually missing elsewhere.

green-tea-benefits.name: Sami
green-tea-benefits.comment: Switching from sugary drinks to green tea has helped me a lot. Great article.

green-tea-benefits.name: Noreen B.
green-tea-benefits.comment: Loved the cultural context with science. It made the advice feel very practical.

green-tea-benefits.name: Hamza R.
green-tea-benefits.comment: Helpful explanation about caffeine and timing. My sleep has improved after changing timing.
